title: vvp: Handle copying of empty dynamic array and queue

features.name: empty dynamic array assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment where one dynamic array is assigned from another empty dynamic array

features.name: empty queue assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment where one queue is assigned from another empty queue

features.name: empty queue to dynamic array assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment of an empty queue to a dynamic array

features.name: empty dynamic array to queue assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment of an empty dynamic array to a queue

features.name: new array copy from empty dynamic array
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array new operation that copies from an empty dynamic array

features.name: new array copy from empty queue
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array new operation that copies from an empty queue
